title: StudyMetrics
description: StudyMetrics contains metrics describing a DICOM study.

blobStorageSizeBytes.description: Total blob storage bytes for all instances in the study.

instanceCount.description: Number of instances in the study.

seriesCount.description: Number of series in the study.

structuredStorageSizeBytes.description: Total structured storage bytes for all instances in the study.

study.description: The study resource path. For example, `projects/{project_id}/locations/{location_id}/datasets/{dataset_id}/dicomStores/{dicom_store_id}/dicomWeb/studies/{study_uid}`.
